This '''Rebel pilot''' was an [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who crash-landed on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. When approached by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], the pilot surrendered, but was [[Death/Legends|killed]] nonetheless. A [[Jawajawa clan|group]] of [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]] later stole the pilot's X-wing and used it to steal a [[TIE Advanced x1/Legends|TIE Advanced]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] from a trio of salvagers.

==Behind the scenes==
This individual only appears in the story ''[[Oh!! Jawajawa]]'', published in ''[[Star Wars Manga: Silver]]'' issue of [[Tokyopop's Star Wars Manga]]. Originally published in Japan, those stories were considered to be of "fuzzy" continuity by Lucasfilm.<ref>{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=980#15895005|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=2006-11-06|time=6:03 PM}}</ref> Since then, they have been republished in English in the United Kingdom under [[Infinities]] label, which established the material in them as [[Canon|non-canonical]].
